text.tspan: Every verdict comment + reject transition below
is now attributed to the reviewer
single-step: the one PR is the whole set → review loop (step 3)
no branch / no open PR → flag & skip this sub-task
[step 2 — per In Review sub-task: discover branch + PR]
record approved, skip re-review → next sub-task PR
[step 3 — per sub-task PR (In Review, sequential, one pass)]

g.text: [All approved, some not yet merged — step 4a]
[at least one sub-task PR to review]

text.tspan: phase check found an open parent PR → step 5b

g.text: [Multistep — parent PR open (re-run, sub-tasks already merged)]

svg.text: acli is now the reviewer account
"no open PR yet — reviewer runs once it exists"
3a idempotency — my prior verdict comment on this PR?
GitHub-for-Jira handles Done, no re-run needed"
git branch -a | grep <SUBTASK-KEY>, gh pr list
"no sub-task PRs to review — re-run later"
3a idempotency — my prior verdict comment on this PR?
"all approved — merge manually, then re-run for the parent PR"
"parent PR is closed — stop, user decides"
"parent PR changes requested — fix on <PARENT-BRANCH> & re-run"
"parent PR reviewed and approved — merge manually"
